demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Removed extension of the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
Replaced field injection with constructor injection for CustomUserDetailsService to align with modern Spring best practices.
Replaced the deprecated configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method with a dedicated AuthenticationProvider bean.
Updated the AuthenticationManager bean definition to retrieve it from AuthenticationConfiguration instead of using super.authenticationManagerBean().
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: public AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(AuthenticationConfiguration config) throws Exception { return config.getAuthenticationManager(); }

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean using the new lambda DSL.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain securityFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { return http ... .build(); }

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() with authorizeHttpRequests() and requestMatchers() in the security filter chain.
Updated CORS configuration to use the new lambda-based syntax within the SecurityFilterChain builder.
Updated CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based syntax within the SecurityFilterChain builder.
Updated session management configuration to use the new lambda-based syntax within the SecurityFilterChain builder.
Removed the import for @Autowired since field injection was replaced by constructor injection.
Removed the import for the deprecated AuthenticationManagerBuilder class.
Removed the import for the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class.
Added imports for AuthenticationProvider and DaoAuthenticationProvider to support the new authentication configuration.
Added import for AuthenticationConfiguration to support retrieving the AuthenticationManager.
Added import for SecurityFilterChain to support the new security configuration bean.
Added import for AntPathRequestMatcher to support the new request matching syntax.
Replace direct User entity binding in login endpoint with a dedicated LoginRequest DTO to decouple API contract from domain model.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: Changed method signature from `@RequestBody User user` to `@RequestBody LoginRequest loginRequest` and added import for `LoginRequest`.

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Explicitly set the authentication object in the SecurityContextHolder after successful authentication to ensure the security context is populated for the current request.
Simplify user retrieval by fetching the User entity directly from the repository using the email from the authenticated principal, removing dependency on CustomUserDetailsService casting.
Update JWT token generation to use the User entity directly instead of passing UserDetails and fullUser separately, aligning with the new lookup strategy.
Expand the login response to include user details (ID, email, name) alongside the JWT token for immediate client-side use.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: Added `userId`, `email`, `firstName`, and `lastName` to the response Map returned by the login endpoint.

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Replace generic exception throwing with specific HTTP status codes and error messages for authentication failures and internal errors.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: Replaced `throw new Exception(...)` with `catch (AuthenticationException e)` returning `HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED` and a generic `catch (Exception e)` returning `HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR`.

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Move GoogleIdTokenVerifier initialization from the request handler to the constructor to avoid recreating it on every login attempt.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: Added constructor with @Value injection and NetHttpTransport setup; removed local verifier creation in googleLogin method.

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Switch from parsing the 'name' field to using standard 'given_name' and 'family_name' fields from the ID token payload.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: Replaced name.split logic with payload.get("given_name") and payload.get("family_name").

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Include user details (ID, email, name) in the authentication response alongside the JWT token.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: Changed return body from Map.of("token", jwt) to a HashMap containing token, userId, email, firstName, and lastName.

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Remove stack trace printing and provide a cleaner error message in the HTTP response body.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.human_impl: Removed e.printStackTrace() and updated catch block to return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body("Error processing Google login: " + e.getMessage()).

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/sec.general_idea: Added firstName and lastName to the JWT claims map to include more user context.
Removed explicit setClaims call in favor of individual claim setters for cleaner builder usage.
Added userId to the JWT token to allow easy identification of the user without decoding all claims.
Simplified issuedAt date creation by using new Date() instead of new Date(System.currentTimeMillis()).
Upgraded JWT signature algorithm from HS256 to HS512 for stronger security.

demo1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot starter parent version to 3.4.4 to align with the new Java version and framework features.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.

frontend/src/components/Dashboard.jsx.general_idea: Update user profile state initialization to fallback to localStorage if JWT decoding fails or fields are missing.
Ensure all user-specific data stored in localStorage is removed during the logout process.

frontend/src/components/Login.jsx.general_idea: Update standard login handler to persist additional user profile fields (userId, email, firstName, lastName) returned by the backend.
frontend/src/components/Login.jsx.human_impl: const { token, userId, email: userEmail, firstName, lastName } = response.data; localStorage.setItem('userId', userId); ...

frontend/src/components/Login.jsx.general_idea: Refine error logging to extract specific backend error data and add a user-facing alert for login failures.
frontend/src/components/Login.jsx.human_impl: console.error('Login failed', error.response ? error.response.data : error.message); alert('Login failed. Please check your credentials.');

frontend/src/components/Login.jsx.general_idea: Update Google login handler to persist additional user profile fields (userId, firstName, lastName, email) returned by the backend.
Remove verbose console.log statements from the Google login success path to reduce noise in production logs.
frontend/src/components/Login.jsx.human_impl: Removed: console.log('Google login response:', credentialResponse); console.log('Backend response:', response.data);
